commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 2 Chronicles 1:4 But the ark of God had David brought up from Kiriath-jearim to the place which David had prepared for it: for he had pitched a tent for it at Jerusalem. Douay Rheims 1609 HE made also an altar of brass (a) of twenty cubits in length, and of twenty cubits in breadth, and of ten cubits in height. (a) As well the Temple as the Altars, and other appurtenances were made after the form of Moses Tabernacle altars of sacrifice & incense, and the rest: but greater in quantity, of more precious matter, and more excellent workmanship.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
